policy: Durable audit entries record quality, schema, provenance, runtime, and cleanup readiness decisions before old primitive sources are turned off.

criteria.name: independent-primitive
criteria.evidence: The skill is stored under skills/reference-doc-workflow and is composed by documentation-workflow and planning-and-docs by reference rather than living inside a plugin payload.

criteria.name: first-party-handling
criteria.evidence: manifests/promotions.json records Anthropic doc-coauthoring as a renamed and rewritten source with canonicalName reference-doc-workflow.

criteria.name: collision-safety
criteria.evidence: manifests/consolidation-report.json reports zero first-party name collisions and zero first-party raw digest matches.

evidence.summary: skills/reference-doc-workflow/SKILL.md exists as the canonical renamed documentation workflow.
node scripts/validate-manifests.mjs validates marketplace, plugin, promotion, audit, runtime, and cleanup manifests.

sourceCandidates.notes: Local source retained for provenance; do not delete until runtime activation and cleanup ledger entries are written.
Runtime copy resolves to Apollo and remains a later activation cleanup candidate.
Installed marketplace source is provenance only and should not be rewritten in place.

entries.notes: Promotion is ready. Cleanup is not yet ready because runtime activation and source-removal ledger entries have not been recorded.
